zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Ramsey於1502年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾希哈姆時，他的父親Ralph Ramsey48歲，母親Joan Ann Smyth52歲。他於1520年與Susannah Isham在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾巴金哈姆結婚。他去世於1579年在他的家鄉享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Ramsey于1502年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾希哈姆时，他的父亲Ralph Ramsey48岁，母亲Joan Ann Smyth52岁。他于1520年与Susannah Isham在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾巴金哈姆结婚。他去世于1579年在他的家乡享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ramsey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish, English, and Irish (Antrim): habitational name from Ramsey (Huntingdonshire, now part of Cambridgeshire), from Old English hramsa ‘wild garlic’ + ēg ‘island, low-lying land’. Alternatively, the name may also arise from Ramsey (Essex), probably from the same etymology as the Huntingdonshire placename. However, this is unlikely to be the source of the Scottish surname. This form of the surname is also common in Ireland, where it is probably in most if not all cases an altered form of Scottish Ramsay .

variants.name: Ramsay
meanings: Scottish and English: variant (the usual spelling in Scotland) of Ramsey . The Scottish Ramsays derive from Simund de Ramesie, recorded before 1175, who went to Scotland from Ramsey (Huntingdonshire).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Ramsey was born in 1502, in Hitcham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Ramsey, was 48 and his mother, Joan Ann Smyth, was 52. He married Susannah Isham in 1520, in Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1579, in his hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Ramsey est né en 1502, à Hitcham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Ramsey, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Joan Ann Smyth, avait 52 ans. Il a épousé Susannah Isham en 1520, à Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1579, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Ramsey è nato il nel 1502 nel Hitcham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph Ramsey, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Joan Ann Smyth, aveva 52 anni.
